texto: At a time when special interest money is being showered on legislators in Washington, grassroots donors offer members of Congress a refreshing independence. The $25 and $50 donor is not looking for special favors. He or she is simply expecting their Congressman to go do the right thing.
explicacao: Citação de John Sarbanes sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. “At a time when special interest money is being showered on legislators in Washington, grassroots …” articula negocios, time, money em registro de negocios, com relevância para contextos como termino e money.

frase_original: At a time when special interest money is being showered on legislators in Washington, grassroots donors offer members of Congress a refreshing independence. The $25 and $50 donor is not looking for special favors. He or she is simply expecting their Congressman to go do the right thing.
